referal.title: Referal Programm
referal.shareText: Join inDrive and ride on your terms. Download now:

discountPopup.discountPopupTitle: Your 10% discount is valid for 3 days

onboarding.onboardingTitle4: Invite friends and track their status here
onboarding.finalModalText: Want to go through it again? Just click the "Replay Onboarding" button in your profile.

preferences.discountTextStart: Get X% off your next ride by filling in your preferences — your discount is valid for 3 days
preferences.discountTextRecieved: Great, you've specified your preferences. Get your X% discount.
preferences.title: My Preferences
preferences.tooltip: Your driver will see your preferences
preferences.disclamer: We'll try to honor your preferences, though some may not always be possible.

places.sureDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this address?
places.adressRemoved: The address has been removed from My Places.
places.adressSaved: The address has been saved in My Places.

mainStats.title: My Statistics this month
mainStats.recordedTrips: No trips recorded yet. Add your first trip above!

ridesRanges.range0: Just chillin’? No rush — the streets will be here when you’re ready.
ridesRanges.range1: Getting in the groove — every ride adds up!
ridesRanges.range2: You’re on a roll now — let’s keep it movin’.
ridesRanges.range3: Wheels spinning and vibes high — you’re owning the road.
ridesRanges.range4: You and the city? That’s a real thing now.
ridesRanges.range5: Straight-up ride royalty — no one’s doing it like you.

ridesRangesPrice.range0: Your ride, your rules — whenever you’re ready to roll.
ridesRangesPrice.range2: You’re working the system — smart rides only.
ridesRangesPrice.range3: Pro moves — you’ve got this game down.
ridesRangesPrice.range4: You ride how you want — every time. Respect.

ridesPrefTime.empty: Keep cruisin’ — we’ll catch your ride rhythm soon.
ridesPrefTime.morningText: Early rides, fresh vibes — let’s go!
ridesPrefTime.eveningText: Sunset trips hit different — real chill.
ridesPrefTime.nightText: Late rides, city lights — you got the night on lock.

trips.title: Trip Tracker
trips.errors: Amount must be greater than zero

compleatedModalText.0: This badge is now yours. Keep going!
compleatedModalText.2: Another step forward — keep collecting achievements!
compleatedModalText.3: Time to celebrate — you’ve earned it!
compleatedModalText.4: This badge is now part of your journey.
compleatedModalText.5: You’re one step closer to completing them all.

go_getter.title: On a roll
go_getter.text: One month, 5 trips. Great to see you!

marathoner.title: Ace
marathoner.text: One month, 10 trips. You’re on fire!

machine.title: Legendary
machine.text: One month, 50 trips. You love inDrive?

early_bird.title: Early Bird
early_bird.text: Up early? Ride between 5:00 and 7:00 a.m.

cashless_pro.title: No cash
cashless_pro.text: Pay for 5 trips without using cash

plot_twist.title: Plot Twist
plot_twist.text: Driver took a ride as a passenger

busy_bee.title: Busy Bee
busy_bee.text: Got a package? We’ll deliver it for you

strong_one.title: Mr. Muscles
strong_one.text: Try a cargo trip for a change

now_i_drive.title: Reborn
now_i_drive.text: From rider to driver, make the switch!

life_of_the_party.title: Celebrity
life_of_the_party.text: Got 5 friends? Invite them to join

first_ride.title: Rookie
first_ride.text: Your first trip is waiting—go for it!

new_horizons.title: New Horizons
new_horizons.text: Take the leap—go to another city

stylish.title: Stylish
stylish.text: Go big: 5 rides in Comfort Class
